creator: mmendez@energyhq.be
text:
On Dec 21, 2007, at 2:00 AM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

Hello,

> Please note that PR ports/118914 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/118914


I've read the PR and don't fully understand what are you trying to  
say. gtk-send-pr doesn't fill the synopsis by itself, it just sets it  
to whatever the user writes.

Could you elaborate a bit on what the issue is? Does it also happen  
with 0.4.9?

Cheers,

Miguel Mendez
